# noi-spinner



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

(INTERNAL) render a apinner.

Icons are embedded inside the component (so far).

Icon size can be changed by 'font-size' style

## Dependencies

### Used by

 - [noi-checkbox](../checkbox)

### Graph
```mermaid
graph TD;
  noi-checkbox --> noi-spinner
  style noi-spinner fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px
```
